692  	 LOOP
693  	     DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('===================');
694  		 DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE ('CFR token ' || duplicate_cfr_list_rec.consumer_realm_id);
695  		 SELECT PAYSTUB_SEQ into v_pstub_seq FROM(
696  		     select PAYSTUB_SEQ from pspadm.psp_paystub where PSTUB_EMPLOYEE_INFO_FK in
697  			 (select PSTUB_EMPLOYEE_INFO_SEQ from pspadm.PSP_PSTUB_EMPLOYEE_INFO where EMPLOYEE_FK in
698  			     (select EMPLOYEE_SEQ from pspadm.PSP_EMPLOYEE where consumer_realm_id=duplicate_cfr_list_rec.consumer_realm_id))
699  		     order by Paycheck_date desc
700  		 ) WHERE ROWNUM<=1;
701  
702  	    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('The latest paystub seq is '|| v_pstub_seq);
703  
704  	    select e.employee_seq into v_employee_seq from pspadm.PSP_PAYSTUB ps ,pspadm.PSP_PSTUB_EMPLOYEE_INFO psei,pspadm.PSP_EMPLOYEE e where --0d0ebb9f-1b25-4aca-8885-4ba6a494aa56
705  		 ps.PSTUB_EMPLOYEE_INFO_FK= psei.PSTUB_EMPLOYEE_INFO_SEQ
706  		 AND psei.employee_fk=e.employee_seq
707  		 AND ps.PAYSTUB_SEQ=v_pstub_seq;
708  
709  	    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('The corresponding Employee seq  is  '|| v_employee_seq);
710  
711  
712  	     v_emp_list_to_update := '';
713  	      emp_array.delete();
714  	      v_count :=1;
715  	     FOR employee_rec in (select * from pspadm.PSP_EMPLOYEE where consumer_realm_id=duplicate_cfr_list_rec.consumer_realm_id)
716  	     LOOP
717  
718  
719  		 IF employee_rec.employee_seq = v_employee_seq THEN
720  		      dbms_output.put_line('Skipping the Employee seq  '||employee_rec.employee_seq);
721  		      Continue;
722  		 END IF;
723  		 DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('The employee seq is ' || employee_rec.employee_seq);
724  		 --v_emp_list_to_update :=v_emp_list_to_update||''',';
725  		 emp_array.extend();
726  		 emp_array(v_count) :=	employee_rec.employee_seq;
727  		 v_count :=v_count+1;
728  
729  	     END LOOP;
730  
731  
732  
733  	     --  dbms_output.put_line('v_count is '||v_count);
734  	       select count(*) into v_count from pspadm.psp_employee where employee_seq in
735  	       (select * from table(emp_array));
736  
737  
738  	      dbms_output.put_line('Count of employees to be updated is '||v_count||' For cfr '||duplicate_cfr_list_rec.consumer_realm_id );
739  
740  	      FOR emp_rec in   ( select * from pspadm.psp_employee where employee_seq in
741  	       (select * from table(emp_array)))
742  	      LOOP
743  		   dbms_output.put_line('Emp whose cfr is being update to null	is  '||emp_rec.employee_seq);
744  	      END LOOP;
745  
746  	       -- TODO uncomment in PROD ::: update employees cfr to null in v_emp_list_to_update
747  	       update pspadm.psp_employee set consumer_realm_id = NULL where  employee_seq in
748  		(select * from table(emp_array));
749  
750  	 END LOOP;
751  
752  
753  
754  EXCEPTION
755    WHEN OTHERS THEN
756  	 DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE ('Error : ' || SQLERRM);
757  END;
